api3.title: API3
api3.subtitle: First-party oracle network enabling decentralized API connectivity

firstPartyOracle.title: First-Party Oracle Infrastructure
firstPartyOracle.subtitle: Direct API provider integration eliminating intermediary layers
firstPartyOracle.advantagesDesc: API3's first-party oracle architecture eliminates intermediary layers, providing higher transparency, lower latency, and stronger security guarantees.

overview.title: Risk Assessment Dashboard
overview.description: Comprehensive risk evaluation covering coverage pool solvency, data source diversification, network operational health, and staking mechanism stability.

coveragePool.title: Coverage Pool Solvency
coveragePool.lowRisk: Robust coverage pool with adequate collateral reserves
coveragePool.mediumRisk: Elevated risk - coverage ratio below recommended threshold
coveragePool.criticalRisk: Critical risk - insufficient collateral to cover potential claims

concentration.title: Data Source Concentration Risk
concentration.diversified: Well-diversified across multiple asset classes and providers
concentration.mediumConcentration: Moderate concentration - elevated exposure to crypto assets
concentration.highConcentration: High concentration risk - excessive reliance on single asset class

network.title: Network Operational Risk
network.excellent: Optimal network health with strong performance metrics
network.fair: Acceptable network health with minor performance degradation
network.poor: Suboptimal network health - significant operational risks identified

staking.title: Staking Mechanism Risk
staking.moderate: Acceptable risk profile with sustainable yield structure
staking.elevatedRisk: Elevated risk - yield rate may indicate unsustainable incentives
staking.highYieldRisk: High risk profile - excessive yields suggest potential instability

oevNetworkLaunch.title: OEV Network Launch
oevNetworkLaunch.description: Introduction of Oracle Extractable Value network for improved MEV protection

airnodeV2Release.title: Airnode V2 Release
airnodeV2Release.description: Major upgrade to Airnode with enhanced gas optimization and monitoring

dapiCoverageExpansion.title: dAPI Coverage Expansion
dapiCoverageExpansion.description: Added 50+ new dAPIs with improved redundancy mechanisms

infrastructureUpgrade.title: First-Party Oracle Infrastructure Upgrade
infrastructureUpgrade.description: Routine infrastructure optimization for first-party oracle nodes

dimensions.decentralizationDesc: Distribution of data sources and node operators
dimensions.securityDesc: Coverage pool solvency and insurance mechanisms
dimensions.dataQualityDesc: Accuracy and reliability of price feeds

overview.title: Multi-Oracle Comparative Analysis
overview.description: Benchmark API3 performance against leading oracle networks: Chainlink, Pyth Network, Band Protocol, and DIA. Evaluate key metrics across latency, precision, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

responseTime.title: Latency Performance Benchmark
responseTime.description: Measures end-to-end data delivery speed. Lower values indicate superior responsiveness.

accuracy.title: Data Precision Comparison
accuracy.description: Evaluates price accuracy against reference benchmarks. Higher scores reflect greater reliability.

availability.title: Service Availability Metrics
availability.description: Network uptime percentage measured over trailing 30-day period.

costEfficiency.title: Cost-Effectiveness Analysis
costEfficiency.description: Composite score integrating gas costs, update frequency, and operational overhead.

updateFrequency.title: Update Cadence Benchmark
updateFrequency.description: Mean interval between consecutive price updates, measured in seconds.

advantages.title: API3 Differentiation Factors
advantages.firstPartyValue: Direct API provider relationships eliminate intermediary trust assumptions
advantages.quantifiableSecurityValue: On-chain coverage pools deliver transparent, auditable security guarantees
advantages.dapiValue: Aggregated first-party data feeds with DAO-governed parameters
